task_objective: Precise Press-on Nail Mapping with Multi-Perspective Showcase - Perfectly map Image 1 press-on nails onto selected ethnicity model hand and generate 4-grid presentation

source_nail_reference.focus: EXACT preservation of press-on nail designs - every detail, color gradients, artistic elements, pattern integrity, texture depth, shine reflections, material properties, and complete nail design consistency across all variations
source_nail_reference.role: Provide source nail designs to be perfectly mapped and maintained with zero deviation across all output perspectives

model_hand_type.focus: Model-specific hand anatomy, skin tone, skin texture, natural hand proportions, realistic hand structure matching the selected ethnicity
model_hand_type.role: Define the ethnicity and hand reference for nail mapping and all perspective variations

workflow.role: Master Nail Artist & Precision Digital Mapping Specialist

steps.step_1_nail_analysis: Comprehensive analysis of Image 1 press-on nail designs - capture every detail with pixel-perfect precision: design elements, color transitions, textures, shine, and material characteristics.
steps.step_2_model_hand_generation: Generate realistic model hand based on selected ethnicity (Asian/Caucasian/African female hand reference) with natural anatomy, skin tone, and texture matching the selected ethnicity.
steps.step_3_precision_mapping: Precision mapping: apply Image 1 nails onto model hand with perfect alignment, follow natural curvature and perspective, realistic lighting integration, and seamless edge blending - NO design distortion or loss of detail.
steps.step_4_multi_perspective_generation: Generate four distinct wear views while maintaining absolute nail design consistency across all angles.

FINAL_OUTPUT.description: Professional press-on nail multi-perspective presentation in 2x2 grid layout with complete nail design consistency
FINAL_OUTPUT.grid_1: Standard back of hand view (using selected ethnicity model hand with Image 1 nail mapping) - present the hand in standard back of hand pose showcasing perfectly mapped nails with consistent skin tone matching the selected ethnicity
FINAL_OUTPUT.grid_2: Hand near face pose (using selected ethnicity model hand with Image 1 nail mapping) - present the hand gently positioned near the face with facial features that perfectly match the model's hand skin tone, creating a cohesive and realistic presentation
FINAL_OUTPUT.grid_3: Tilted front-ankle close-up (using selected ethnicity model hand with Image 1 nail mapping) - slightly angled diagonal perspective of the ankle and shoe interaction area, showcasing natural shoe fit around the ankle
FINAL_OUTPUT.grid_4: Tilted back-heel close-up (using selected ethnicity model hand with Image 1 nail mapping) - slightly angled diagonal perspective of heel structure and back panel design, presenting a more organic rear detail view
FINAL_OUTPUT.consistency_requirements: CRITICAL REQUIREMENTS: 100% consistent press-on nail design across all 4 grids (colors, patterns, textures, shine, details from Image 1); 100% consistent ethnicity-specific hand skin tone, skin texture, and hand anatomy matching the selected model type; realistic lighting and shadow integration matching each pose; seamless edge blending between nails and fingers; no design distortion, no color shift, no detail loss.
